headline: Newmont’s Partner Discoveries Add Long Term Optionality To Valuation Story
summary: Newmont's joint venture partner Irving Resources reported high grade gold and silver assays from the Shika prospect at the Noto project in Japan. Gold Terra announced positive drilling results at the Yellorex zone on the Con Mine Option property in Canada, held under an option agreement with a Newmont subsidiary. These updates highlight exploration progress in projects where Newmont participates through partnerships rather than direct operatorship. Newmont (NYSE:NEM) is drawing attention...
